{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "notepad.exe loaded .NET runtime and numerous PowerShell-related modules (e.g., System.Management.Automation.ni.dll), and deleted a temporary PowerShell script, which is highly unusual for a simple text editor.",
  "indicators": [
    "notepad.exe",
    "clr.dll",
    "System.Management.Automation.ni.dll",
    "Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.Diagnostics.ni.dll",
    "Microsoft.PowerShell.ConsoleHost.ni.dll",
    "Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.Utility.ni.dll",
    "temporary script deletion",
    "__PSScriptPolicyTest_1rfon1no.g1g.ps1"
  ]
}
